list.title: Automations
list.subtitle: Predefine what you want the agent to do, then run it via schedule, webhook, or manually.
list.empty_hint: Clear the filters or start a new run.
list.select_run_hint: Click an item in the Runs list to see its details here.

coworker.greeting: Coworker helps you get it done
coworker.description: Makes the documents and files you need.

prompts.label: IRR calculation
prompts.seedText: Create an IRR calculation table in Excel for an AI startup investment. Include capital calls, exit payouts, and a year-by-year cash flow analysis, with the returns calculated automatically by formula.

prompts.label: Investor pitch deck
prompts.seedText: Make an investor pitch deck. Cover the business problem, our solution, the market opportunity, the business model, our competitive advantage, a team overview, and detailed financial projections, and make it persuasive and data-driven so it helps with fundraising. Make it about 10 slides including a title slide and a closing slide, in a clean, professional PowerPoint design.

prompts.label: Tidy up meeting notes
prompts.seedText: Read the meeting notes file I've attached and turn it into a clean summary. Put a short overview at the top, list the key decisions that were made, and add an action-item table with columns for task, owner, and due date. List any open questions or unassigned items separately at the end.

prompts.label: Email draft
prompts.seedText: Write a clear, professional email announcing an update to my team. Give it a subject line, a short friendly opening, the main points laid out clearly, and a clear next step at the end. Leave a spot for me to fill in the specific details, and write it in a ready-to-send email format.

speedwagon.greeting: Speedwagon finds answers in your files
speedwagon.description: Answers your questions using your project's files and the web.

prompts.label: Find a date
prompts.seedText: Find the contract or launch dates in the documents.

prompts.label: Find with sources
prompts.seedText: Find last year's revenue in the documents and cite the source.

prompts.label: Top complaint
prompts.seedText: Find the most common complaint in the survey responses.

deep-research.description: Researches a topic in depth across the web and writes you a report.

prompts.label: Market sizing
prompts.seedText: Analyze the size of the EV charging infrastructure market from several angles. Estimate TAM/SAM/SOM, give a five-year growth forecast, identify the key drivers and headwinds shaping the market, break down the major customer segments, and map the competitive landscape and how the leading players are positioned.

prompts.label: Competitor benchmarking
prompts.seedText: Run an in-depth benchmarking study of the six leading companies in the cloud data warehouse space. Compare their core features, pricing, market share, customer satisfaction, and go-to-market strategy, then lay out each one's strengths, weaknesses, differentiation, and target segment, and draw out the implications for us.

prompts.label: Customer persona research
prompts.seedText: Research and map detailed customer personas and journey maps for a subscription-based online learning platform. Identify each persona's goals and motivations, their main pain points and decision criteria, analyze the touchpoints from awareness through sign-up and renewal, and pinpoint where users drop off along with concrete opportunities to improve conversion.

buddy.description: A general chat for anything else, from quick questions to ideas.

prompts.label: Brainstorm ideas
prompts.seedText: Throw out 10 quick ideas for the Q3 campaign

prompts.label: Explain terms
prompts.seedText: Explain these domain terms in simple language

prompts.label: Translate
prompts.seedText: Translate this sentence into natural Korean

run_detail.duplicate_disabled: Only completed runs can be duplicated
run_detail.preview_empty: This run has no session content to display.

form.new_subtitle: Define a name and prompts, and optionally set up the first trigger.
form.name: Name
form.prompts_hint: Evaluated in order at run time. The first prompt becomes context for later steps.
form.agent_model_hint_new: The agent and model used in the session created when a trigger fires. Leave the model on "Recommended" to resolve via the recommendation chain at run time.
form.first_trigger_hint: You can add one later or attach more.
form.webhook_token_hint: The token is shown only once, right after creation. Keep it somewhere safe.
form.none_hint: Created without a trigger. You can invoke it from the list with the manual run button.

detail.not_found_body: This automation was deleted or you don't have permission.
detail.status_on_hint: Enabled — runs when a trigger fires.
detail.status_off_hint: Disabled — won't run even when a trigger fires, and the manual run button is blocked too.
detail.prompts_hint: Evaluated in order at run time. The first prompt becomes context for later steps.
detail.agent_model_hint: The agent and model used in sessions created when a trigger fires going forward. Doesn't affect in-progress or completed runs. Leave the model on "Recommended" to resolve via the recommendation chain at run time.
detail.webhook_token_hint: The token is shown only once, right after creation. Keep it somewhere safe.
detail.danger_body: Deleting this automation removes all run history and webhook tokens.
detail.delete_confirm_body: Really delete the '{{name}}' automation? All run history and webhook tokens will be lost.

toast.agent_model_saved: Saved the run agent and model

sched.interval_hint: cron only supports N>1 for the hourly unit.

webhook_dialog.title: Webhook token
webhook_dialog.warn: This token is shown only once. After you close this you won't be able to see it again, so store it somewhere safe.
webhook_dialog.ack: I've stored the token somewhere safe.
